createHint: The job will be created as inactive. You can configure schedule, query, and other settings on the next page.
noJobsDesc: Schedule recurring tasks like SQL queries, API calls, or webhooks.

form.name: Job Name
form.cronHelp: Format: minute hour day month weekday. Use * for any.
form.sqlQueryPlaceholder: DELETE FROM sessions WHERE expires_at < NOW()

actionTypeDesc.sql: Execute a SQL query in the project database on schedule. Use for cleanup, aggregations, reports, or any data processing.
actionTypeDesc.api_call: Send an HTTP request to any URL. Fetch data from external APIs, trigger tasks on other services, or sync data.
actionTypeDesc.webhook: Send a POST request with a payload. Notifications to Telegram, Discord, Slack, or any webhook-compatible service.

urlSource.noEndpoints: No active endpoints in this project. Create one in API Endpoints first.
urlSource.noWebhooks: No webhooks in this project. Create one in Webhooks first.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Cron Job
deleteConfirm.desc: This will stop and permanently delete this cron job. This action cannot be undone.
